1: O deliver me from the deceitful and unjust man.
2: Why go I mourning because of the oppression of the enemy?
3: Let them bring me unto thy holy hill, and to thy tabernacles.
4: Yea, upon the harp will I praise thee, O God my God.
5: For I shall yet praise him, Who is Who is the health of my countenance, and my God.
